description: Providers Tab UI/UX Overhaul — resolve all 13 findings from the Settings→Providers deep analysis: persisted connection-test status, catalog get-key links, multi-expand accordion, bulk 'test all', keyless-field hiding, single reveal control, double-border/disabled-visual fixes, prompt-editor relabel, EmptyState, microcopy, and accessibility (aria-controls/region).
analysis_source: Deep UI/UX analysis of entrypoints/options/sections/ProvidersSection.tsx + ProviderCatalogPicker + ModelPicker + ConnectionTestProgressList + readiness logic. 13 findings grouped A1-A5, B1-B5, C1-C5, D1-D4.
